title: Tyne's Typeface
description: A resource pack that aims to make the English font look more organized and simple.
body:
A custom font that heavily modifies all letters, numbers, and symbols to look neater and more uniform with a hint of stylization.

Takes heavy inpiration from [qrafty's Capitalized Font](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/qraftys-capitalized-font) and the font seen in [Faithless](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/faithless).
